_comment: Branch protection for main. GitHub rejects this with 403 on a PRIVATE repo without Pro, so it can only be applied once the repo is public. Apply with: gh api -X PUT repos/dripsmvcp/ReasonMetrics/branches/main/protection --input .github/branch-protection.json  (verify with: gh api repos/dripsmvcp/ReasonMetrics/branches/main/protection --jq '.required_status_checks.contexts')
_contexts_note: Context strings are the JOB names as CI reports them, not the workflow names. 'guard' is path-guard.yml's job id (it has no display name). path-guard skips for dripsmvcp; a skipped job still reports, so it does not deadlock maintainer PRs.
_enforce_admins_note: false on purpose: solo maintainer still pushes directly to main while working alone. Flip to true when a second maintainer exists.
